title: Sweetroot
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Sweetroots.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A bowl of sweetroot]]
'''Sweetroot''' was a food eaten by the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] during its final campaign on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]. [[Darovit]] disliked its taste.

{{Food-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 3|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 3]]
